items.name: A5 Wagyu Beef
items.notes: A5 Wagyu retail $120-180/lb from Wagyu Handbook (Feb 2026) and LatestCost.com (2026). 2oz AYCE portion standard.

items.name: LA Galbi (Short Rib)
items.notes: Bone-in short rib $8.92/lb USDA AMS May 2026 benchmark. 4oz typical serving.

items.name: Prime Ribeye Slices
items.notes: Bone-in ribeye averaged $11.34/lb USDA AMS May 2026. Prime adds ~20% premium.

items.name: Chadolbaegi (Brisket)
items.notes: Brisket $4-5/lb retail. Thinly shaved AYCE cut.

items.name: Bulgogi (Marinated Beef)
items.notes: Sirloin/round base $5-7/lb. Marinade adds ~$0.30 value.

items.name: Beef Tongue (Gyutan)
items.notes: Beef tongue $8-12/lb specialty cut. Popular at premium AYCE spots.

items.name: Gopchang (Small Intestine)
items.notes: Beef small intestine $8-10/lb specialty offal. High demand in Korean BBQ.

items.name: Samgyeopsal (Pork Belly)
items.notes: Pork belly $3.50-4.50/lb Costco/H-Mart. Classic KBBQ staple.

items.name: Spicy Marinated Pork
items.notes: Pork shoulder/loin base. Gochujang marinade standard.

items.name: Pork Jowl (Hangjeongsal)
items.notes: Pork jowl $5-7/lb specialty cut. Prized for marbling and texture.

items.name: Marinated Pork Ribs
items.notes: Pork spare ribs $3-4/lb. Ganjang or gochujang marinade.

items.name: Marinated Chicken Thigh
items.notes: Chicken thigh $2-2.50/lb boneless. USDA FoodData Central nutrition.

items.name: Spicy BBQ Chicken
items.notes: Chicken breast/thigh with yangnyeom sauce. Slightly leaner profile.

items.name: Head-On Tiger Shrimp
items.notes: Large head-on shrimp $12-16/lb specialty seafood market.

items.name: Live Scallop
items.notes: Live scallops $18-22/lb Pike Place Market City Fish rates 2026.

items.name: Squid (Ojingeo)
items.notes: Whole squid $4-6/lb. High protein, low calorie seafood option.

items.name: Kimchi
items.notes: Napa cabbage kimchi. H-Mart pricing ~$5/lb packaged.

items.name: Corn Cheese
items.notes: Sweet corn, mozzarella, mayo blend. Popular KBBQ side.

items.name: Japchae (Glass Noodles)
items.notes: Sweet potato glass noodles stir-fried with vegetables and beef.

items.name: Steamed Egg (Gyeran Jjim)
items.notes: Fluffy steamed egg custard. 3 eggs typical per serving.

items.name: Tteokbokki (Rice Cakes)
items.notes: Rice cake cylinders in gochujang sauce. H-Mart frozen base.

items.name: Gyoza / Mandu (Dumplings)
items.notes: Pork and vegetable dumplings. 4-5 pieces per serving.

items.name: Sundubu Jjigae (Soft Tofu Stew)
items.notes: Spicy soft tofu stew with seafood or pork. Restaurant staple add-on.

items.name: A5 Wagyu Slices
items.notes: A5 Wagyu paper-thin sliced for shabu. Same sourcing as KBBQ.

items.name: Prime Ribeye Roll
items.notes: Thinly rolled prime ribeye for hotpot dipping. USDA AMS benchmark.

items.name: Brisket Slices
items.notes: Beef brisket $5-7/lb wholesale. Popular hotpot protein.

items.name: Live Clams
items.notes: Live manila or littleneck clams $10-14/lb seafood market.

items.name: Head-On Shrimp
items.notes: Large head-on shrimp $12-16/lb specialty seafood.

items.name: Fresh Oysters
items.notes: Fresh oysters $1.50-3 each retail. 3 pieces per serving typical.

items.name: Fish Tofu & Fish Balls
items.notes: Processed fish cake products $3-5/lb. Common hotpot fillers.

items.name: Napa Cabbage
items.notes: Napa cabbage $0.60-1.00/lb retail.

items.name: Enoki Mushrooms
items.notes: Enoki mushroom bundles $2-3 each. H-Mart standard.

items.name: King Oyster Mushrooms
items.notes: King oyster $4-6/lb specialty mushroom. Meaty texture.

items.name: Firm Tofu
items.notes: Firm tofu $2-3/lb. USDA FoodData Central nutrition.

items.name: Glass Noodles (Dangmyeon)
items.notes: Sweet potato starch noodles. Dry weight, cooks up 3x.

items.name: Udon Noodles
items.notes: Fresh udon $3-4/pack. Popular hotpot finish.

items.name: Rice Cakes (Tteok)
items.notes: Cylinder rice cakes $3-5/lb H-Mart. Chewy hotpot addition.

items.name: Dumplings
items.notes: Pork and vegetable dumplings. 4-5 pieces per serving.

items.name: Spring Rolls
items.notes: Fried vegetable spring rolls. 3 pieces per serving typical.

items.name: Otoro (Fatty Bluefin Tuna)
items.notes: Bluefin toro $40-80/lb wholesale. Nigiri portion ~1oz. Surveyed NYC sushi bars 2025-2026.

items.name: Uni (Sea Urchin)
items.notes: Sea urchin retail $16.44-48.86/lb Selinawamucii.com April 2026. ~0.75oz per nigiri.

items.name: Ikura (Salmon Roe)
items.notes: Salmon roe $25-40/lb specialty seafood.

items.name: Wagyu Beef Nigiri
items.notes: A5 wagyu on rice. Premium AYCE offering. ~1oz seared wagyu.

items.name: Live Scallop Nigiri
items.notes: Live diver scallop. Pike Place City Fish $18-22/lb.

items.name: Salmon Nigiri
items.notes: Atlantic salmon 142 cal/19.8g protein per 100g USDA FoodData Central. ~1oz nigiri.

items.name: Tuna Nigiri (Maguro)
items.notes: Yellowfin tuna $12-18/lb retail. Standard AYCE sushi protein.

items.name: Yellowtail Nigiri (Hamachi)
items.notes: Japanese yellowtail $18-25/lb premium import.

items.name: Eel Nigiri (Unagi)
items.notes: Unagi eel $20-28/lb pre-glazed. Japanese import or farmed.

items.name: Shrimp Nigiri (Ebi)
items.notes: Cooked butterfly shrimp $8-12/lb. Classic AYCE sushi protein.

items.name: Salmon Sashimi (3pc)
items.notes: 3 x 1oz slices Atlantic salmon. USDA FoodData Central per 100g.

items.name: Tuna Sashimi (3pc)
items.notes: 3 x 1oz slices yellowfin tuna. Lean, high protein.

items.name: Yellowtail Sashimi (3pc)
items.notes: 3 x 1oz slices hamachi. Premium import pricing.

items.name: Dragon Roll
items.notes: Shrimp tempura inside, avocado on top. 8 pieces per roll.

items.name: Rainbow Roll
items.notes: California base topped with assorted sashimi. Labor-intensive.

items.name: Spicy Tuna Roll
items.japaneseName: スパイシーツナロール
items.notes: Tuna with sriracha mayo. Popular AYCE staple.

items.name: California Roll
items.japaneseName: カリフォルニアロール
items.notes: Imitation crab, avocado, cucumber. Entry-level AYCE roll.

items.name: Spider Roll
items.notes: Soft shell crab tempura. Labor-intensive and cost-heavy.

items.name: Edamame
items.notes: Frozen edamame $2-3/lb. High protein appetizer.

items.name: Miso Soup
items.notes: Miso paste, tofu, wakame. Inexpensive but universal.

items.name: Agedashi Tofu
items.notes: Fried silken tofu in dashi broth. Labor and ingredient cost moderate.

items.name: Mochi Ice Cream
items.notes: Mochi ice cream ~$1.50-2 each retail. 1 piece per serving.

items.name: Green Tea Ice Cream
items.notes: Matcha ice cream. Standard AYCE dessert offering.
